title: Regional Compensation & Benefits Manager (APAC)
description:
Job Description:

  • Formulate and execute compensation and benefits strategies that support the organization’s overall goals and business objectives.
  • Continuously review market trends, industry benchmarks, and leading practices to maintain competitive and effective compensation and benefits offerings.
  • Create and manage compensation frameworks, including salary structures, incentive schemes, and bonus programs, to attract, motivate, and retain high-performing talent.
  • Lead the annual salary review cycle by conducting market studies, evaluating compensation data, and proposing appropriate salary adjustments.
  • Supervise the administration of employee benefits programs, such as health coverage, wellness initiatives, and other benefit offerings.
  • Work closely with internal stakeholders to ensure full compliance with applicable compensation and benefits laws and regulations.
  • Partner with HR teams and business leaders to provide expert advice and support on compensation- and benefits-related issues.
  • Develop and deliver training sessions and communication materials to help employees understand compensation and benefits programs.
  • Address employee questions and escalations related to compensation and benefits, ensuring accurate, timely, and effective resolution.
  • Ensure all compensation and benefits records and documentation are properly maintained and kept up to date.

Requirements:

  • Degree in Human Resource, Business Administration or any related fields.
  • Minimum 8 years experiences in compensation and benefits management.
  • Excellent communication and presentation skills.

Interested applicants for the above advertised position(s), please kindly email an updated copy of your resume to: gs1@talenttradersg.com;


EA License No.: 13C6305

Registration No.: R23117856 CHOE KIN MUN


For candidate who applied for the advertised position is deemed to have consented to us that we may collect, use or disclose your personal information for purpose in connection with the services provided by us.

postedCompany.description:
TALENT TRADER GROUP PTE. LTD.

Talent Trader is steered by young, dynamic professionals; each of them bringing their own vast experiences from leading Banks and HR Agencies.


We provide efficient talent sourcing, recruitment and retention services that help companies acquire effective Mid-management talent.


We offer the following value-added services for a variety of Mid-management positions across industry veticals such as Banking, Marine, Offshore, Retail, IT, F&B, Education, Manufacturing and Others:


- Talent Sourcing and Recruitment

- International Recruitment

- Contract & Temporary Staffing

- Payroll Services

- Employment Passes
